other_observers: Nick Komar, Sol Miller; I don’t remember who found it, but a lot of birders were able to see it as it hung out in the area for a while.
description: We saw the bird fly in. We noticed an off white belly and a brown back, tail, and wings. We didn’t notice any rufous on the wings. We got a good look as it sat for a long time. We saw a long tail with small spots on the underside. It had black legs and eye with a red orbital ring. It had a small bill with a black upper mandible and gray lower mandible.Behaviors: It flew close to us from the south and sat in a tree for a while allowing for several photos, it then flew to a fence line and sat there for about 45 seconds, it then flew back south.Call: I never heard itPlumage: Adult
